name: wmkf_portal_membership
_comment: Intake-portal slice 0. The ONE new pilot entity (contact <-> account join with approval state). NAMING: logical name is wmkf_portal_membership WITH internal underscores — a deliberate deviation from sibling wmkf_App* entities (wmkf_apprequestperson etc. have none). The underscore form is hardcoded across docs/INTAKE_ADMIN_MEMBERSHIPS_BUILD_PLAN.md (incl. targetEntity:'wmkf_portal_membership' line 264) + design + reserved integers; deviating would break the build-plan contract. Connor reviews this one entity's shape before creation (project_dataverse_creator_privileges, summary-after). Shape locked: docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_DESIGN.md:98-117. ATLAS must record exact @odata.bind keys at deploy (wmkf_Contact / wmkf_Account / wmkf_RequestedBy / wmkf_ApprovedBy) per build plan line 80-85.
description: Applicant-portal institution-claim membership: a contact's claimed association with an account (institution), with self-service request + staff approval state. Alt key (contact, account) — one row per (person, institution) pair regardless of approval state; re-applying after rejection updates the existing row. Pending vs. revoked vs. rejected are distinct (wmkf_approvalstatus carries the distinction; statecode alone cannot). Admin approve/reject surface is a SEPARATE downstream slice (docs/INTAKE_ADMIN_MEMBERSHIPS_BUILD_PLAN.md) — only the entity is slice 0.

attributes.description: Submitter grants institution-wide submit authority; contributor is read/assist. Request-level allowed-submitters is a Phase 1 follow-up, not pilot.
Flags the official-communications contact for this (contact, account) pair.
Lifecycle: requested -> approved | rejected | revoked. approved + statecode active = live. Drives the admin queue (waiting-on-approval vs. cut-off).

Slice-0 addition (docs/INTAKE_ADMIN_MEMBERSHIPS_BUILD_PLAN.md s2). Nullable — absence means no prior decision (no 4th value). On re-application the applicant slice copies the current wmkf_approvalstatus terminal value here before flipping back to requested; admin GET reads it for priorDecision.status. Integer values reserved 2026-05-14 (S150) — DO NOT renumber.
When the membership was requested (self-service or staff-initiated).
When staff approved. Null until approved.
Optional staff note, surfaced to the applicant on rejection.

relationships.lookupDescription: The person claiming the institution association.
Contact who initiated the request (self-service applicant, or staff acting on their behalf). Optional.
Staff systemuser who approved/rejected. Null until a decision is made.
